tasks.title: Real-corpus coi-screen validation (~814K ICIJ): exercise mmap end-to-end + answer B-1 (is full-graph enumeration a hot path?)
Harden the JSON<->mmap equivalence oracle to property-based/fuzzed coverage (precondition for mmap-default in v1.2)
OpenTelemetry tracing + SLO/SLI docs (additive; pairs with existing Prometheus metrics)
Re-enable the disabled fuzz tests (pkg/api/fuzz_test.go.disabled, pkg/query/fuzz_test.go.disabled)
